message:
core: implement bd-1hi.18 erasure-coded page storage .db-fec sidecar (§3.4.6)

DbFecHeader with xxh3 checksum and db_gen_digest staleness guard.
DbFecGroupMeta with content-addressed object_id (BLAKE3) and per-page
xxh3_128 validation hashes. Page group partitioning (G=64, R=4, page 1
gets 400% redundancy). O(1) segment offset computation for random
access. On-the-fly XOR parity repair path with integrity validation.

30 tests including header/meta roundtrip, digest computation, stale
sidecar detection, page group partitioning (various sizes), segment
offset O(1), repair path (intact/single-corruption/exceed-corruption),
E2E bitrot recovery, compliance gates, and property tests.

Closes: bd-1hi.18

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
